text:
- Update to 3.1.r3,1
This version is the same as 3.1 final, but I'm keeping the rc3 format in order to stay compatible with future release candidates (3.1+)
Also set NO_LATEST_LINK to make Erwin "Annoying Reminder Guy III" Lansing stop haunting me :)
